qa_pair.question: Inspect the code signature of the system binary /bin/ls. What is the name of the certificate authority at the ROOT of its authority chain?
Inspect the code signature of /Applications/Safari.app. What is the FIRST authority listed in its signature (the immediate signer, not the chain root)?
Look up Safari in this Mac's application inventory. According to the inventory, where was it obtained from?
A launchd property list is discovered at ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.example.helper.plist. What scope label does the persistence inventory assign to items found in that directory?
The persistence inventory flags one launchd scope as unusual and worth a close look because that directory is non-standard. Which scope label is it?
When the security posture check reports enabled=null for FileVault, what single word describes the actual state of that control according to the server's semantics: "off", "on", or "unknown"?
The local accounts tool separates real login accounts from system/daemon accounts using a numeric uid threshold. Accounts at or above which uid are treated as real login accounts?
Request the one-call posture report with no arguments and count its top-level sections. How many sections does the default report contain?
Exactly one of the following sections is included in the default one-call posture report: "network", "time_machine", "xprotect", "persistence". Which one?
List the third-party launch items with a page size (limit) of 5. If more items exist beyond the first page, what is the value of the field that tells you which offset to request next?
